use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF PATIENTS WITH ANAPLASTIC LYMPHOMA KINASE (ALK)-POSITIVE METASTATIC NON-SMALL CELL LUNG CANCER (NSCLC) WHO HAVE PROGRESSED ON OR ARE INTOLERANT TO CRIZOTINIB
